label: Greek Dark Ages
description: period of time in ancient Greece

label: Bronze Age
description: prehistoric period and age studied in archaeology, part of the Holocene Epoch

label: Middle Bronze Age
description: a period in ancient history following the Stone Age, characterized by the discovery of bronze and advancements in civilization

label: classical antiquity
description: age of the ancient Greeks and Romans

label: Eastern Mediterranean
description: region that is geographically located to the east of the Mediterranean Sea

label: Near East
description: geographical term that roughly encompasses Western Asia, and in some definitions parts of the Balkans

label: Peloponnese
description: large peninsula and geographic region in southern Greece; named after the Greek mythological hero Pelops

label: Near and Middle East
description: collective term for Near East and Middle East
aliases: the Near East and Middle East

label: Mediterranean Sea
description: sea between Europe, Africa and Asia

label: Levantine Sea
description: peripheral sea of the Mediterranean Sea

label: Libyan Sea
description: sea, part of the Mediterranean Sea between Libya and Crete, Greece

label: Aegean Sea
description: part of the Mediterranean Sea, between the Greek mainland, the Turkish mainland, Crete, and Rhodes

label: Ionian Sea
description: an elongated bay of the Mediterranean Sea, south of the Adriatic Sea, bounded by Southern Italy (Calabria, Sicily, Salento peninsula) to the west, southern Albania to the north, and the west coast of Greece to the east

label: Adriatic Sea
description: body of water between the Italian Peninsula and the Balkan Peninsula
